017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.*;
029
030import com.github.mustachejava.*;
031
032/**
033 * Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the Mustache raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the
034 * {@link MustacheMixin} mixin, the {@link MustacheServlet} servlet, and the {@link MustacheResource}
035 * child flavors.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * This is the §2.3.1 <i>flavor-neutral worker</i> for the Mustache capability: it is <b>not</b> one
039 * of the three {@code @Rest} flavor classes &mdash; it is a plain bean that implements
040 * {@link RawTemplateDispatcher} and holds the capability state ({@code basePath} /
041 * {@code templateSuffix} / lazy default factory) plus the raw-serve and factory-resolution logic.
042 * Each flavor independently holds an instance of this worker and delegates to it, so no flavor is
043 * another flavor's worker.
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
046 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MustacheMixin}
047 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MustacheServlet}
048 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MustacheResource}
049 *    <li class='jic'>{@link RawTemplateDispatcher}
050 * </ul>
051 *
052 * @since 10.0.0
053 */
054@SuppressWarnings({
055   "resource" // Closeables here are framework-managed and not owned/closed by this class; not a real leak.
056})
057public class MustacheDispatcher implements RawTemplateDispatcher {
058
059   /** Default base path applied when no {@link Builder#basePath(String)} call has been made. */
060   public static final String DEFAULT_BASE_PATH = "/";
061
062   /** Default template suffix &mdash; empty (literal template names, no implicit suffix). */
063   public static final String DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX = "";
064
065   private final String basePath;
066   private final String templateSuffix;
067
068   // Lazy bridge-default factory. Built on first call to resolveMustacheFactory(...) when no
069   // MustacheFactory bean is registered in the request's BeanStore. Volatile so the
070   // double-checked-locking idiom is safe under concurrent first-request load.
071   @SuppressWarnings({
072      "java:S3077" // Publish-once cache: assigned once under double-checked locking in resolveMustacheFactory(); the MustacheFactory is fully built before assignment, so volatile safe-publication is sufficient.
073   })
074   private volatile MustacheFactory defaultFactory;
075
076   /**
077    * Creates a new builder.
078    *
079    * @return A new builder.
080    */
081   public static Builder create() {
082      return new Builder();
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Builder constructor.
087    *
088    * @param builder The builder. Must not be {@code null}.
089    */
090   protected MustacheDispatcher(Builder builder) {
091      basePath = builder.basePath;
092      templateSuffix = builder.templateSuffix;
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Returns the base path under which template resources are resolved.
097    *
098    * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
099    */
100   public String getBasePath() {
101      return basePath;
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Returns the configured template-name suffix.
106    *
107    * @return The template suffix. Never {@code null}.
108    */
109   public String getTemplateSuffix() {
110      return templateSuffix;
111   }
112
113   /**
114    * Appends {@link #getTemplateSuffix()} to {@code name} if not already present (idempotent).
115    *
116    * @param name The template name. Must not be {@code null}.
117    * @return The template name with the configured suffix appended (if applicable).
118    */
119   public String applyTemplateSuffix(String name) {
120      if (isEmpty(templateSuffix))
121         return name;
122      if (name.endsWith(templateSuffix))
123         return name;
124      return name + templateSuffix;
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * Resolves the active {@link MustacheFactory}.
129    *
130    * <p>
131    * Lookup order:
132    * <ol class='spaced-list'>
133    *    <li>{@code req.getContext().getBeanStore().getBean(MustacheFactory.class)} &mdash; any
134    *       user-supplied bean (Spring {@code @Bean}, microservice {@code BasicBeanStore.put},
135    *       etc.).
136    *    <li>Lazy bridge default &mdash; constructed on first call when no factory bean is
137    *       registered. Carries a {@link DefaultMustacheFactory} anchored on a resource root
138    *       derived from {@link #getBasePath() basePath} (leading + trailing slashes trimmed).
139    * </ol>
140    *
141    * @param req The current REST request.
142    * @return The active Mustache factory. Never {@code null}.
143    */
144   public MustacheFactory resolveMustacheFactory(RestRequest req) {
145      var bean = req.getContext().getBeanStore().getBean(MustacheFactory.class);
146      if (bean.isPresent())
147         return bean.get();
148      var local = defaultFactory;
149      if (local == null) {
150         synchronized (this) {
151            local = defaultFactory;
152            if (local == null) {
153               local = buildDefaultFactory();
154               defaultFactory = local;
155            }
156         }
157      }
158      return local;
159   }
160
161   /**
162    * Constructs the bridge-default {@link MustacheFactory}.
163    *
164    * <p>
165    * {@link DefaultMustacheFactory} anchored on a classpath resource root derived from
166    * {@link #getBasePath() basePath} (leading + trailing slashes trimmed). A {@code "/"} base
167    * yields a no-prefix factory. Subclasses may override to plug in custom resolvers / object
168    * handlers without registering a separate {@code @Bean MustacheFactory}.
169    *
170    * @return A new {@link MustacheFactory} instance.
171    */
172   protected MustacheFactory buildDefaultFactory() {
173      var root = toResourceRoot(basePath);
174      return root.isEmpty() ? new DefaultMustacheFactory() : new DefaultMustacheFactory(root);
175   }
176
177   /**
178    * Translates a virtual base path (e.g. {@code "/templates/"}) into a mustache.java resource
179    * root (e.g. {@code "templates"}).
180    *
181    * <p>
182    * mustache.java's {@link DefaultMustacheFactory#DefaultMustacheFactory(String)} expects a
183    * classpath-relative root without a leading slash and treats a trailing slash as part of the
184    * resolved path, so we trim both ends. A {@code null} / blank / {@code "/"} base yields an
185    * empty string &mdash; meaning "no prefix" (factory resolves names directly).
186    *
187    * @param base The virtual base path.
188    * @return The mustache.java resource root (never {@code null}).
189    */
190   static String toResourceRoot(String base) {
191      if (isBlank(base))
192         return "";
193      var s = base;
194      while (s.startsWith("/"))
195         s = s.substring(1);
196      while (s.endsWith("/"))
197         s = s.substring(0, s.length() - 1);
198      return s;
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * Renders a raw template through the Mustache engine onto the response.
203    *
204    * @param path The trailing path segment after the mount prefix (the template name relative to
205    *    the configured {@link #getBasePath() base path}; configured suffix appended if missing).
206    * @param req The current REST request.
207    * @param res The current REST response.
208    * @throws IOException If the underlying response writer fails.
209    * @throws BasicHttpException On boundary violation (403), missing engine (500), or render
210    *    failure (500).
211    */
212   @Override /* RawTemplateDispatcher */
213   public void render(String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
214         throws IOException, BasicHttpException {
215
216      var template = (path == null) ? "" : path;
217
218      // resolveVirtualPathSafely validates that the resolved virtual path stays inside the
219      // configured basePath. The traversal check operates on basePath + template so a template
220      // name like "../../etc/passwd" or "a/b/../../../secret" is rejected before reaching the
221      // engine. We re-derive the factory-relative template name from the safe result by
222      // stripping the (already-normalized) basePath prefix.
223      String safeTemplate;
224      try {
225         var resolved = FileUtils.resolveVirtualPathSafely(basePath, template);
226         safeTemplate = stripBasePath(basePath, resolved);
227      } catch (IllegalArgumentException ex) {
228         throw new Forbidden("Path escapes configured base path.");
229      }
230
231      // Apply suffix idempotently so /mustache/about resolves to about.mustache (when
232      // templateSuffix is configured), while /mustache/about.mustache stays as-is.
233      safeTemplate = applyTemplateSuffix(safeTemplate);
234
235      try {
236         var factory = resolveMustacheFactory(req);
237         if (! res.containsHeader("Content-Type"))
238            res.setHeader("Content-Type", MustacheViewRenderer.DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE);
239         var mustache = factory.compile(safeTemplate);
240         mustache.execute(res.getWriter(), Map.of()).flush();
241      } catch (LinkageError ex) {
242         throw new InternalServerError(ex, MustacheViewRenderer.NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC);
243      } catch (IOException | BasicHttpException ex) {
244         throw ex;
245      } catch (Exception ex) {
246         throw new InternalServerError(ex, "Mustache render failed for ''{0}''", safeTemplate);
247      }
248   }
249
250   /**
251    * Strips the normalized {@code basePath} prefix from a {@code resolveVirtualPathSafely}
252    * result so the leftover string is factory-relative (the bridge's default factory re-adds
253    * the configured resource-root prefix).
254    *
255    * <p>
256    * Normalization mirrors {@code FileUtils.resolveVirtualPathSafely}: a {@code null} / empty
257    * base normalizes to {@code "/"}; otherwise the base is guaranteed to start with {@code "/"}
258    * and end with {@code "/"} once the helper has normalized it.
259    *
260    * @param base The configured base path (typically {@code "/templates/"}).
261    * @param resolved The output of {@code resolveVirtualPathSafely} (always starts with the
262    *    normalized base).
263    * @return The factory-relative template name (e.g. {@code "hello.mustache"} for base
264    *    {@code "/templates/"} and resolved {@code "/templates/hello.mustache"}).
265    */
266   static String stripBasePath(String base, String resolved) {
267      var bp = isEmpty(base) ? "/" : base;
268      if (! bp.endsWith("/"))
269         bp = bp + "/";
270      if (! bp.startsWith("/"))
271         bp = "/" + bp;
272      if (resolved.startsWith(bp))
273         return resolved.substring(bp.length());
274      throw iaex("Resolved path ''{0}'' does not start with base ''{1}''", resolved, bp);
275   }
276
277   /**
278    * Builder for {@link MustacheDispatcher}.
279    */
280   public static class Builder {
281
282      String basePath = DEFAULT_BASE_PATH;
283      String templateSuffix = DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX;
284
285      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link MustacheDispatcher#create()}. */
286      protected Builder() {}
287
288      /**
289       * Sets the classpath base path under which template resources are resolved.
290       *
291       * @param value The base path. {@code null} or blank values reset to the default
292       *    {@link MustacheDispatcher#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH}.
293       * @return This object.
294       */
295      public Builder basePath(String value) {
296         basePath = isBlank(value) ? DEFAULT_BASE_PATH : value;
297         return this;
298      }
299
300      /**
301       * Sets the suffix to append to template names that don't already end with it (idempotent).
302       *
303       * @param value The new suffix. {@code null} resets to
304       *    {@link MustacheDispatcher#DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX}.
305       * @return This object.
306       */
307      public Builder templateSuffix(String value) {
308         templateSuffix = (value == null) ? DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX : value;
309         return this;
310      }
311
312      /**
313       * Reads the current base path setting (test/inspection helper).
314       *
315       * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
316       */
317      public String getBasePath() {
318         return basePath;
319      }
320
321      /**
322       * Reads the current template-suffix setting (test/inspection helper).
323       *
324       * @return The template suffix. Never {@code null}.
325       */
326      public String getTemplateSuffix() {
327         return templateSuffix;
328      }
329
330      /**
331       * Builds the {@link MustacheDispatcher}.
332       *
333       * @return A new {@link MustacheDispatcher} instance.
334       */
335      public MustacheDispatcher build() {
336         if (basePath == null)
337            throw iaex("basePath must not be null");
338         return new MustacheDispatcher(this);
339      }
340   }
341}
